candidates.why: Primary sales line; however a more comprehensive aggregated revenue line exists.
Generic revenue line but only populated for some years; a clearer total revenue line exists.
Explicit total revenue line aggregating sales and other revenue effects; best single top-line measure over time.
Finance income, not operating revenue; should not be used as main revenue measure.
Interest income, not operating revenue.
Interest income, not operating revenue.

variables.notes: Uses the explicit aggregated line 'Total Revenue' as primary top-line, with 'Revenue' and then 'Sales of Goods & Services - Gross' as fallbacks for years where labels may differ.

candidates.why: Direct cost of inputs to production; best representation of cost of goods sold.
Could include both production and overhead labor; less clean as pure COGS.
Mixed operating item, not strictly cost of sales.
Likely broader operating overhead, closer to SG&A than direct COGS.
Net operating balance, not a component cost line.
Financing costs, not production costs.
Financing costs, not production costs.
Financing costs, not production costs.

variables.notes: Selects direct materials and consumables as the closest standalone COGS proxy; other candidate lines are overhead or financing-related.

candidates.why: Mixed operating item that may include non-overhead components; less clean for SG&A.
Represents operating expenses other than COGS, consistent with SG&A-type overhead.

variables.notes: Uses 'Other Operating Expenses' as the main SG&A-type overhead bucket. Excludes the mixed 'Other Operating Income/Expense' subtotal to avoid combining income and expense in SG&A.
No research & development-related line items appear in the provided income statement; R&D is treated as zero.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Core interest expense line net of capitalized interest; primary measure of financing cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest component of lease liabilities; relevant interest expense when the main line is missing.
Represents capitalized, not expensed, interest; should not be treated as period expense.

candidates.row_label: Derivatives on interest rates - Hedging - Gain/Loss
candidates.why: Hedging gains/losses, not pure interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; secondary fallback after the main lease interest line.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Prioritizes the general interest expense net of capitalized interest, then the specific lease interest lines as fallbacks. Excludes capitalized interest and interest-rate derivative gains/losses, which are not pure period interest expense.

candidates.why: Component of equity but excludes share capital and retained earnings; not total book equity.
Represents total shareholders' equity; no separate non-controlling interests line appears, so this is appropriate for BE.
Balance sheet total, not equity alone.

variables.notes: Uses total equity as book equity because there is no separate non-controlling interests line; thus BE covers all equity and MIB is set to zero.
No line for minority/non-controlling interests appears on the balance sheet; MIB is treated as zero.
